# coolify_project (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a single Coolify project by its UUID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_project" "example" {
  uuid = "existing-project-uuid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `uuid` (String) The unique identifier of the project to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) A description of the project.
- `name` (String) The name of the project.
